text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Our sauna endurance showdown<n>yesterday was so
intense!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I was confident in my skills, but I<n>never
anticipated such a long battle.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We gotta do it again! I bet sauna<n>training is great
for racing in the summer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Undoubtedly. The thought of a pre-race<n>contest
is also quite invigorating.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must say though, I was surprised that<n>you didn't
use the cold water bath<n>afterward.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
After going through all that trouble, I<n>couldn't
just throw that heat away!<n>Never let yourself cool
down!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The flame of the heart burns eternal!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I-I see now... But take care not to<n>collapse from
heat exhaustion.
